summary.text: Shared memory storage layout type for
require a temporary memory allocation of this nested type for thread communication. This opaque storage can be allocated directly using the
keyword. Alternatively, it can be aliased to externally allocated memory (shared or global) or
'd with other storage allocation types to facilitate memory reuse.
